objective: Inspect the visible field-kit planner and patch the annotated DOM so the user understands what to do next.
instructions: Reason from the screenshot and supplied game state only.
Explain what the user appears to be doing in observation and intent.
Patch only the targets listed in the DOM contract.
Prefer small helpful UI changes over large rewrites.
If the user is close to launch, highlight the next missing category or constraint.
If the screen already looks successful, add a concise success note instead of warnings.
